hero.title: Turn One Successful Project Into More High-Value Deals
hero.description: Barbot is Deal Fanout Intelligence for high-tech Sales and FAE. It connects technical content, customer needs, project sessions, and closed-won patterns to identify similar customers, applications, and buying signals.
hero.statement: High-tech sales does not suffer from a lack of leads. It suffers from losing the technical validation, customer pattern, and close motion hidden inside each successful project. Barbot turns every close into the engine for the next set of opportunities.
hero.tip: ⚡ High-tech Sales / FAE. Long-cycle projects. Deal Fanout Intelligence.
hero.avatars_tip: Trusted by hardware and procurement engineers

logos.title: Three product surfaces. One deal fanout system.

introduce.title: What We Build
introduce.label: Deal Fanout Intelligence
introduce.description: Barbot is not a CRM and not a generic chatbot. It connects technical assets, customer projects, agent sessions, and closed-won paths so one successful project can fan out into more similar customers.

items.title: Barbot for Knowledgebase
items.description: Turn product specs, application notes, selection logic, FAQs, and closed-won cases into technical trust assets that customers, engineers, buyers, and agents can use.

items.title: Deal Fanout Loop
items.description: Extract customer patterns, technical paths, objection handling, and close motions from won projects, then match them to more customers and applications.

benefits.title: Why It Keeps Fanning Out Deals
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: High-tech sales value is not in a single answer. It is in long-cycle project motion, reusable technical validation, and expansion into similar accounts.

items.title: Built Around Long-Cycle Projects
items.description: Designed around design-in, evaluation, replacement, quotation, sampling, technical validation, procurement, and production ramp instead of one-off chat.

items.title: Closed-Won Patterns Become Replayable
items.description: Every project captures content, Q&A, tool calls, field actions, and outcomes so the next fanout is based on evidence instead of memory.

items.title: From One Customer to More Customers
items.description: The system identifies similar industries, applications, technical blockers, and buying signals, then recommends proven paths for new opportunities.

usage.title: From One Project to a Pipeline of Opportunities
usage.description: Barbot turns single-project success into reusable, searchable, executable deal fanout.

items.title: Move the Field Conversation

items.title: Fan Out Across Deals

testimonials.title: What Field Teams Say
testimonials.description: Feedback from high-tech Sales, FAE, and procurement-adjacent roles.

items.name: Sales
items.quote: A successful project used to live in someone's memory. Now the system shows which customers can reuse the same wedge.

items.name: FAE
items.quote: When a customer asks about replacement parts or design risk, I can pull the explanation and path from similar projects.

items.name: Procurement Collaboration
items.quote: The context no longer disappears across docs, chats, and follow-ups. Long cycles are much easier to continue.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Have another question? Talk to our team.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Book a demo and we'll walk you through the platform.

items.question: What makes BatBot different from a generic AI chatbot?
items.answer: BatBot is built for long-cycle high-tech Sales and FAE work. It does not answer one question and disappear; it connects technical content, customer projects, agent sessions, and closed-won paths so one win can fan out into more similar customers.

items.question: What are Barbot for Web, Electron, and Knowledgebase?
items.answer: Barbot for Web is the browser field-agent workspace. Barbot for Electron is the desktop multi-deal agent operating system. Barbot for Knowledgebase is the technical content, case, and selection-logic foundation. Together they form Deal Fanout Intelligence.

items.question: What content can BatBot ingest?
items.answer: Specs, application notes, replacement tables, reference designs, customer Q&A, project records, quotation moments, FAE technical reasoning, closed-won cases, and internal training materials. Custom ingestion pipelines are available for non-standard formats.

items.question: How is this different from CRM?
items.answer: CRM manages account fields and sales process. BatBot manages the technical knowledge, agent sessions, closed-won paths, and reusable patterns inside projects. It can coexist with CRM, but the core value is fanning out proven project motion into more opportunities.

items.question: Who is it for?
items.answer: It is designed for semiconductor, hardware, industrial, electronic component, equipment, and other high-tech B2B teams where deals are long, valuable, and Sales / FAE collaboration is intensive.

items.question: Is private or on-premise deployment available?
items.answer: Yes. Enterprise plans include private deployment options for data-sensitive environments.

cta.title: Ready to Fan Out Your Successful Projects?
